subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who desired that his Lord should remember him, after he turned and hearkened unto His glorious and wondrous Call. By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اراد ان یذکره مولاه بعدما اقبل و سمع ندآئه العزیز البدیع تالله
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @justice and mercy
